name: nepali-tithi-miti
summary: Safe, cache-first Nepali calendar skill for Bikram Sambat dates, tithi, panchang, festivals, and AD/BS conversion.
description: Nepali Tithi Miti is a safe, cache-first Nepali calendar skill for Bikram Sambat dates, AD/BS conversion, tithi, panchang fields, Nepali festivals, and Nepal-time today lookups. It uses deterministic Python tooling and verified cached data rather than guessing.

data_policy.notes: Do not scrape aggressively or live per user request. Hamro Patro-style ingestion must be explicit, local, cache-first, rate-limited, and allowed by the source.

install.skill_folder: Copy skills/nepali-tithi-miti into the target agent skills directory.
install.python_tool: Run uv sync --extra dev from the repository root.

prompts: Use $nepali-tithi-miti to answer today's Nepali miti in Nepal time.
Use the Nepali Tithi Miti skill to convert 2026-06-13 AD to BS.
Use the skill to look up the tithi for BS 2083-02-18 from verified cached data.
Use uv run nepali-tithi scrape-date 2026-06-13 --source all --cache to extract tithi/miti from configured calendar sources.
